title: IPD Cross-Reference Schema
description: Schema for cross-reference entries in an IPD module linking to AMM, CMM, TSM, SB, SRM, WDM, and KNOT documents per S1000D Issue 5.0 and AMPEL360 Q100 conventions.

ref.description: Document Module Code (DMC) or publication reference identifier

title.description: Human-readable title of the referenced document or task
examples: Cryogenic H₂ Shut-Off Valve – Removal Procedure

ata.description: ATA chapter-section-subject of the referenced document
